ElementPatchMode.description: The mode in which an element is patched into the DOM.

values.description: Morphs the element into the existing element.
Replaces the inner HTML of the existing element.
Replaces the existing element with the new element.
Prepends the element inside to the existing element.
Appends the element inside the existing element.
Inserts the element before the existing element.
Inserts the element after the existing element.

EventType.description: The type protocol on top of SSE which allows for core pushed based communication between the server and the client.

values.name: PatchElements
values.description: An event for patching HTML elements into the DOM.

Namespace.description: The namespace in which elements are created.

values.description: HTML namespace for standard HTML elements.
